name: xmind-logic-map
description: Create reliable, editable XMind mind maps from long-form sources.

interface.shortDescription: Create validated XMind mind maps from source material.
interface.longDescription: Turn videos, documents, web pages, transcripts, and long-form text into reliable, editable XMind mind maps with source links, notes, images, and structural validation.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use $xmind-logic-map to turn this source into a validated, editable XMind mind map.
